sglang.title: [QUANT] Add GPTQModel Dynamic Quantization + `lm_head` Quantization
sglang.author: Qubitium
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Per module GPTQ quantization control/override + Allow loading of quantized lm_head:
Before PR:

All GPTQ modules share the same GPTQConfig (bits, group_size, etc)
Cannot load quantized lm_head

This PR:

Every module can have unique GPTQConfig (bits, group_size, etc)
Specific modules can

sglang.title: Fix triton kernel illegal memory issue for eagle
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In draft extend and target verify stage, the extend_prefix_lens is unprepared and the length is not equal to batch size. That will cause illegal memory issue in the triton kernel for high workload (memory is not enough).

sglang.author: luzengxiangcn
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently radixcache is implemented by several recursive functions, which may cause PYTHON Stack overflow problem when tree hits a certain depth. You may reproduce this issue by following code.
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(base_url="<sglang server url>", api_key="tests")
max_

The original linear hack in transformers backend is just used to avoid modifying vLLM core code as much as possible in inital PR.

Summary of vLLM best_of Parameter Deprecation
Condensed version of the original written by Woosuk Kwon
The vLLM team is discontinuing support for the best_of sampling parameter in the upcoming vLLM V1 release due to its limited adoption among users and the industry's shif

vllm.title: [V1][Easy] Add empty allowed_token_ids in the v1 sampler test
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Raise error if allowed_token_ids is not None and empty, we raise the error. Adding a test to cover this case.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix DeepSeek MTP crash when using TP1ModelRunner with CUDA graph due to shape mismatch
vllm.author: pyc96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using DeepSeek MTP module with TP1 model runner and cuda graph, the server will crash due to shape mismatch. The crash only happens when BS > 1. This PR fixes the mismatch by removing padded items in hidden states.
Launch command:
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --disable-log-reque

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Remove num_tokens_across_dp
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The update line was inadvertently removed during #13931. Currently num_tokens_across_dp will contain the batch_size for the current dp_rank but 0 otherwise. For now removing the variable as it's unused.
Thanks to @markmc for pointing this out https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/13931/files#r19

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Use spawn multiprocessing mode for V1 test pipeline
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I've seen multiple failures related to forking new processes after
cuda has been initialized in this pipeline. Other pipelines use spawn,
so this change applies the same to this one.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [BugFix] MLA + V1, illegal memory access and accuracy issues
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the decode / prefill split in V1 with MLA not being handled correctly leading to inaccurate results when max_num_batched_tokens is low and illegal memory accesses. Also refactored the code to precompute the tensor slicing for prefill and decode metadata.
Main:
** max_num_batched_tokens=1024

VLL
